MenuItem.title: MenuItem
MenuItem.description: A food or beverage item on the restaurant digital menu

category.description: Category of the food item, e.g. Starter, Main Course

spiceLevel.description: Spice level: None, Mild, Medium, Hot

isAvailable.description: Whether the dish is in stock

customizationGroups.description: Optional custom modifiers like size or spice options

Order.title: Order
Order.description: A customer table order sent to the kitchen

tableId.description: The table number placing the order

items.description: List of items in the order

totalPrice.description: Grand total price of the order

specialInstructions.description: Optional special notes for the chef

RestaurantSettings.title: RestaurantSettings
RestaurantSettings.description: General settings and info for the dining system

/menu/{menuItemId}.description: Menu collection storing digitized dish documents

/orders/{orderId}.description: Orders collection containing live kitchen-bound tickets

/settings/{settingsId}.description: App settings, including currency and total tables count
